verse.name: v1
verse.lines: You stood before creation Eternity within Your hand You spoke the earth into motion My soul now to stand

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: You stood before my failure Carried the Cross for my shame My sin weighed upon Your shoulders My soul now to stand

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: So what can I say What can I do But offer this heart O God Completely to You

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: So I'll walk upon salvation Your Spirit alive in me This life to declare Your promise My soul now to stand

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: So what can I say What can I do But offer this heart O God Completely to You

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: So I'll stand With arms high and heart abandoned In awe of the One who gave it all So I'll stand My soul Lord to You surrendered All I am is Yours
